item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else notices this bit?

The soul in the sky is a mistake and the mistake will be crushed by the One and the One will arrive on the mount to bleed the disbelievers and the disbelievers will forget the soul in the sky

With a heaving noise, it leans forward and begins choking. It opens its mouth to expel a cicada, which rapidly flies out of a window.

+ Possible Spoilers
- Close

Anyone else getting a sense Cousin Johnny was trying to reach others through machinery before going with what the Foundation has to deal with now?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Happy one year in containment to SCP-4161!

Excellent article. Creepy, mysterious and interesting in the correct proportions. And the audio file is chilling. I love skips that mix modern and mystical.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I just wonder… why aren't the Special Containment Procedures, the Description, etc. not written in bold?
At first, i thought it was an oversight, but too many people looked at this to miss it, so i expected it to be a format screw of sorts, yet…?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I come back to read this one every once in a while. One of the articles that sticks with me the most for some reason. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
4161 is looking fly in those shades.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
whose idea was that i ask you

It was my idea. I will die for serif fonts, just you wait.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
second time you forgot me rounder *shakes fist*

just ^^kidding^^

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
i was going to wait so i didn't ninja your author post, but you know what? i do what i want. nice timing my circular friend. nice timing indeed. i really love this article - it's got a perfect mix of body horror, sci fi and religious High Weirdness. Like I said in chat, I think this ending is way better than the first version. +1

still hate this theme though why the hell is it a serifed font whose idea was that i ask you

one major point of critique: there is no Site-五.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The third entry for Team Y.U.R.T in INTcon, and our first skip. Thanks to ch00bakka, Mortos, Jekeled, Nico, Aismallard(sorry!)Tufto, Woed, Rattles(also sorry!), McB, and Gecko for offering crit — if I forgot you, please let me know!

Special thanks to Woedenaz for both making the audio player and remastering the audio file!

The image of the Monk is at https://commons.m.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:The_Mumified_Munk.jpg, and is CC BY SA 3.0.
The error message was created at http://atom.smasher.org/error, and is CC BY SA 3.0.
The audio file was created by me by melding together several CC BY SA 3.0 and Public Domain audio files.

Error Message Text For Translators

Throne Fully Powered!
Current location: Taurus Void
Destination: Moon
Time until launch: -00:01:46
Thank you for participating in the ENLIGHTENMENT of the globe of humans by the Glorious Second Siddhartha!
Your contribution will be remembered when you are judged in his Presence!
